items.title: Joe Burrow: Working under center more
items.body_text: The Bengals are spending more time working on their under-center offense more this offseason, Paul Dehner Jr. of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Brenton Strange: Agrees to three-year extension
items.body_text: Strange agreed to terms Wednesday on a three-year extension with the Jaguars, Tom Pelissero of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Chris Olave: Hopes for contract before camp
items.body_text: Olave (illness) said he hopes to finalize a contract extension with the Saints before training camp, Katherine Terrell of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
